description: Evaluate the predictive accuracy of a Probit model on female labor force participation using the 'mroz.gdt' dataset. Estimate a Probit model with 'lfp' as the dependent variable and independent variables: const, k5, k618, age, wc, hc, and inc. Generate the classification (Expectation-Prediction) table for this model. Save the full text output of the classification table to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/classification_report.txt and save the numeric 'Percent correctly predicted' value to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/accuracy_score.txt.
